name: mast-autofocus-validation
description: End-to-end validation: drive MAST_unit's production ps3cli focus-analysis code path (focus_analysis.analyze_focus_files) against bundled FITS focus sweeps using the unit's venv, confirming ps3cli --server can fit a v-curve and return an autofocus solution. The FITS ship as this provider's autofocus-fits.zip asset (git-lfs) and the runner imports MAST_unit via --unit-src. HARD FAILS if the unit clone, venv, or FITS bundle are missing, or if any series does not match its expected outcome.
verify: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "${log}=Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\verify\mast-autofocus-validation-verify.log'; ${smoke}=Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\smoke\mast-autofocus-validation-smoke.txt'; if (-not (Test-Path $smoke)) { 'smoke marker missing' | Out-File -FilePath ${log} -Encoding UTF8; exit 1 }; ${body}=Get-Content $smoke -Raw; if ($body -match 'mast-autofocus-validation_ok') { Set-Content -Path ${log} -Value $body } else { ('unexpected smoke body: ' + $body) | Out-File -FilePath ${log} -Encoding UTF8; exit 1 }"
